programs.title: Cold Case Files: Dead West
programs.desc: When a mystery woman's burning body is found in an oil field in 2006, the rural community of Kilgore and a determined Texas lawman show why you don't mess with the Lone Star State.

programs.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent?:4
programs.desc: A traveling nurse is pulled over for a traffic violation in New Mexico and is arrested for felony burglary carried out in her home state of Ohio. Is she a thug for hire or innocent with a rock-solid alibi.

programs.title: The First 48:26
programs.desc: In Mobile, a brazen gunman shoots another man in front of gas station security cameras, and in Gwinnett County, detectives race to identify a woman shot on the side of the road and track down her killer.

programs.title: Lie Detector: Truth Or Deception
programs.desc: Chris Turner sits for a high-stakes polygraph test in the hopes of ending suspicions surrounding the infamous 1984 murder of Catherine Fuller.

programs.title: Women On Death Row
programs.desc: Kerry Lyn Dalton was sentenced to death for the torture and murder of Irene 'Melanie' May. And because Melanie was a meth addict with no fixed address, police did little to investigate her disappearance.

programs.title: Hoarders:15
programs.desc: Local code enforcement has warned John repeatedly about property violations. With the Hoarders team’s help, he must finally clean up or face enforcement action that could cost him everything.
